name: transit-delivery-atlas
description: Independent, source-linked crosswalk of California transit directives, named bodies, timing, evidence, and analytical delivery relationships.

scripts.build: npm run data:export && node scripts/write-version.mjs && next build
scripts.test: npm run build && node --experimental-strip-types --test tests/data-integrity.test.mjs tests/directive-filters.test.mjs tests/rendered-html.test.mjs tests/hosting.test.mjs
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run audit:production
